active_artifact_generation_status.scope_boundary: Regenerates active paper/main.tex table/figure artifacts from materialized repository result artifacts only; does not claim full raw-data, model-training, filter-estimation, live-public-data, or independent end-to-end reproduction outside the supplied archive.

canonical_artifacts.runtime_provenance_boundary: Machine-specific execution details are retained only in raw runtime artifacts and are not summarized in this reviewer-facing packet.

withdrawn_or_provenance_seed_summaries.reason: Not used as independent repeated-seed corroboration: seed_suite_distinctness shows IDP-RGR-GF duplicates RGR-GF checkpoint state and trajectory-RMSE arrays for seeds 41 and 43.

full_rerun_20260616.artifact_role: Diagnostic/reproducibility evidence only; not generated manuscript table inputs, not canonical figure/table arrays, and not independent-machine or public-DOI reproduction.
full_rerun_20260616.claim_boundary: Non-destructive full raw-data, all-enabled learned-model training, and all-scenario classical+learned evaluation rerun. Does not overwrite submitted artifacts and does not claim independent-machine reproduction.

divergence_audit.boundary: Diagnostic audit only; not a canonical table replacement, not operational validation, not independent reproduction, and not a rerun success upgrade. Failure-conditioned rows are diagnostic only and do not redefine performance or rescue any method.

status_labels.historical_auxiliary: Historical or auxiliary artifact; not current main-manuscript evidence unless regenerated and cited.
status_labels.main_includegraphics: Current main-manuscript figure present through a paper/main.tex \includegraphics{...} command.
status_labels.main_inline: Current main-manuscript content present inline in paper/main.tex.
status_labels.main_input: Current main-manuscript generated table present through a paper/main.tex \input{...} command.
status_labels.release_only_diagnostic: Release/debug/reviewer diagnostic artifact; not currently present in paper/main.tex.
status_labels.supplement_input: Current supplement generated artifact present through a paper/supplement.tex \input{...} or \includegraphics{...} command.
status_labels.supplement_planned: Candidate appendix/supplement artifact; not currently present in paper/main.tex.

paper_title: SPOT-OD: Adaptive-Filter and Observability Mechanism Findings from a Simulator-Bound Orbit-Determination Audit

provenance.runtime_execution_boundary: Machine-specific execution details are omitted from this reviewer-facing summary; raw run records retain their original metadata.

active_artifact_generation.scope_boundary: Regenerates active paper/main.tex table/figure artifacts from materialized repository result artifacts only; does not claim full raw-data, model-training, filter-estimation, live-public-data, or independent end-to-end reproduction outside the supplied archive.

status_evidence.notes: canonical_artifacts.tables and canonical_artifacts.figures mirror the current paper/main.tex main-manuscript inputs and includes. Release-only, historical, and diagnostic files are tracked separately under auxiliary_artifacts and manuscript_inclusion_status.

observed_step_powered_stress_replication.evidence_boundary: Sanitized timestamp-only internal record evidence; this is not external preregistration.
